name: Clifford Chance LLP
description: One of the world’s pre-eminent law firms with significant depth and range of resources across five continents. Vision is to be global law firm of choice for the world’s leading businesses of today and tomorrow. Leading position in Africa and a superb track record of working with local counsel and government bodies across the continent.
